mapper.sql: r.id, r.plan_id, r.volunteer_id, r.period_number, r.service_number, r.service_date, r.service_time_start, r.service_time_end, r.service_content, r.service_photos, r.elderly_condition, r.remarks, r.audit_status, r.audit_by, r.audit_time, r.audit_remark, r.created_at, r.updated_at

SELECT , v.full_name as volunteer_name, v.avatar as volunteer_avatar, a.full_name as auditor_name, cp.plan_name as plan_name, e.name as elderly_name FROM care_plan_service_record r LEFT JOIN sys_user v ON r.volunteer_id = v.id LEFT JOIN sys_user a ON r.audit_by = a.id LEFT JOIN care_plan cp ON r.plan_id = cp.id LEFT JOIN elderly_info e ON cp.elderly_id = e.id
mapper.select: WHERE r.plan_id = #{planId} ORDER BY r.period_number ASC, r.service_number ASC, r.created_at DESC
WHERE r.plan_id = #{planId} AND r.period_number = #{periodNumber} ORDER BY r.service_number ASC, r.created_at DESC
WHERE r.volunteer_id = #{volunteerId} ORDER BY r.created_at DESC
WHERE r.audit_status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY r.created_at ASC
WHERE r.audit_status = #{auditStatus} ORDER BY r.created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE care_plan_service_record SET audit_status = #{auditStatus}, audit_by = #{auditBy}, audit_time = NOW(), audit_remark = #{auditRemark}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM care_plan_service_record WHERE plan_id = #{planId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM care_plan_service_record WHERE plan_id = #{planId} AND audit_status = 'APPROVED'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM care_plan_service_record WHERE volunteer_id = #{volunteerId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM care_plan_service_record WHERE audit_status = 'PENDING'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM care_plan_service_record WHERE audit_status = #{auditStatus}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM care_plan_service_record WHERE plan_id = #{planId} AND period_number = #{periodNumber}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM care_plan_service_record WHERE plan_id = #{planId} AND period_number = #{periodNumber} AND audit_status = 'APPROVED'
